channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: An AI Proxy War Could Reshape Congress Before Congress Reshapes AI
item.description: Massive spending and heated rhetoric in midterm races highlight the AI industry's political divisions and competing visions for the future.

item.title: Morning News Brief
item.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer steps down, Vance and senior Iranian officials meet in Switzerland for high-stakes nuclear talks, and Trump's Iran ceasefire...

item.title: Utah voters consider the type of Democrat they want for a new blue-leaning congressional seat
item.description: The reliably Republican state now has its first competitive district, and Utah Democrats are eager for the opportunity. First, they must decide...

item.title: Abortions nearly double despite state bans, driven by telehealth pill access
item.description: States with abortion bans are suing to stop the mailing of abortion pills across state lines. Telehealth providers say they will continue regardless of the outcome.
